title: SBGN Pathway Visualizer
description: A standalone, browser-based tool to overlay RNA-seq and other omics data onto SBGN (Reactome) and KEGG (KGML) pathway maps. Rendering is deterministic and requires no API key or AI service. KEGG supports both a vector (KGML) view and a pathview-style overlay on KEGG's official pathway image. Exports publication-ready SVG.
